name: CurveKnotStyle
summary: Defines enumerated values for knot spacing styles in interpolated curves.

enum_values.name: Uniform
enum_values.summary: Parameter spacing between consecutive knots is 1.0.

enum_values.name: Chord
enum_values.summary: Chord length spacing, requires degree=3 with CV1 and CVn1 specified.

enum_values.name: ChordSquareRoot
enum_values.summary: Square root of chord length, requires degree=3 with CV1 and CVn1 specified.

enum_values.name: ChordSquareRootPeriodic
enum_values.summary: Periodic with square root of chord length spacing.
